name: Moore Financial Services Inc
description_short: Moore Financial Services is a bonded credit repair company based in Memphis, TN, specializing in disputing credit report errors and inaccuracies to improve client credit scores.
description_long:
Moore Financial Services Inc. (MFS) is a bonded credit repair company headquartered in Memphis, Tennessee, with over 14 years of experience in the credit services industry. The company positions itself as a specialist in addressing inaccuracies on credit reports and helping consumers restore their creditworthiness through legal dispute processes. Founded on principles of transparency and ethical practice, MFS serves consumers who have encountered errors or negative items on their credit reports that may be impacting their financial opportunities.

MFS offers personalized credit repair strategies developed by board-certified credit consultants. Their service begins with a confidential credit evaluation at no obligation, followed by the creation of a customized action plan. The company claims that most clients begin seeing measurable progress within 30-45 days of enrollment. Beyond dispute services, MFS provides credit education resources to help clients understand credit reporting mechanics, scoring factors, and strategies for maintaining improved credit over time. They emphasize compliance with consumer protection laws, including the Fair and Accurate Credit Transactions Act (FACTA) and other relevant regulations.

MFS differentiates itself through explicit commitments to transparency, ethical practices, and compassion-based service delivery. The company promises clear communication about all actions taken, customized strategies rather than one-size-fits-all approaches, and ongoing support beyond initial credit improvements. Their team highlights extensive expertise with over a decade of industry experience and board certifications. The company also emphasizes understanding that credit repair addresses a client's future financial independence, not merely numerical score improvement.

While MFS presents itself professionally with established infrastructure and compliance commitments, potential clients should note that the company explicitly states it "cannot guarantee specific results," which is typical industry language but important context. The website lacks specific pricing information, third-party reviews, or case studies that would allow independent verification of claimed success rates. As with all credit repair services, results depend heavily on individual circumstances and the validity of reported errors.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Bonded credit repair company with 14+ years of industry experience in Memphis, TN
Board-certified credit consultants on staff with extensive expertise
Free confidential credit evaluation with no obligation before committing to services
Promises tailored, customized strategies rather than generic programs
Provides ongoing credit education and financial literacy resources to clients
Explicit commitment to transparency, ethical practices, and compliance with consumer protection laws
Reports majority of clients see progress within 30-45 days of enrollment
cons: No pricing information disclosed on website, making cost comparison impossible
Company explicitly states it cannot guarantee specific results or outcomes
No third-party reviews, case studies, or independent verification of claimed success rates visible on website
Limited details about specific dispute processes or which types of errors they target
No information about accreditation status with credit repair industry organizations (CROA compliance noted but not certified body affiliations)
best_for: Consumers with documented errors or inaccuracies on their credit reports seeking professional dispute assistance
Individuals in the Memphis, Tennessee area who prefer working with a locally-based, established credit repair firm
People seeking personalized credit strategies combined with financial education and ongoing support
Those wanting transparent communication and ethical practices prioritized over aggressive sales tactics
diagnosis: Moore Financial Services is best suited for consumers with verifiable credit report errors who want professional dispute assistance from an established, locally-based firm committed to transparency and ethical practices. The main caveat is that pricing is undisclosed, results are not guaranteed, and independent verification of their success rates is unavailable—standard cautions for any credit repair service.
services: Credit report analysis and error identification
Dispute filing for inaccurate or fraudulent items on credit reports
Board-certified credit consultant guidance and support
Credit education and financial literacy resources
Ongoing support and monitoring of credit improvement progress
Customized action plans tailored to individual financial situations
Compliance with Fair and Accurate Credit Transactions Act (FACTA) and consumer protection laws
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
